quality_highlights.strength: Excellent progressive disclosure with clear examples and practical workflow guidance
Comprehensive inline documentation explaining security rationale

single_file_improvements.issue: Missing introductory context and overview - dives immediately into technical details without explaining the 'why' or providing a conceptual framework
single_file_improvements.user_impact: Enterprise users need to understand the purpose and security model before diving into configuration details

single_file_improvements.issue: Overly casual language ('sous chef', 'nudges') mixed with critical technical requirements creates inconsistent professional tone
single_file_improvements.user_impact: Enterprise automation workflows need clear, formal communication to establish trust and authority
